description: Implement worktree deletion: Add DeleteWorktree(worktreePath string) error function to pkg/worktree package. Execute 'git worktree remove <path>' command. Handle errors (worktree has changes, doesn't exist). Integrate into TUI: when 'd' pressed, show confirmation dialog with worktree details. If confirmed, delete worktree and refresh list. Prevent deletion of primary worktree.
note: Updated with prerequisites and file references
acceptance_criteria: PREREQUISITES: Tasks 03 and 05 must be completed first
DeleteWorktree(worktreePath string) error function exists in operations.go
Returns error if worktree has uncommitted changes or does not exist
TUI shows confirmation dialog when d key pressed (shows path, branch)
Confirmation requires y/n input before deletion
Primary worktrees (IsPrimary=true) cannot be deleted, show error message
After deletion, TUI refreshes worktree list

verification.value: Select non-primary worktree, press d, confirm y, verify removed from list
